headline: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE:DECK) Surges on Q4 Beat and Bullish Multi-Year Outlook
summary: Deckers Outdoor (DECK) beat Q4 estimates with $1.12B revenue and $0.96 EPS, led by HOKA and UGG growth. Stock surged 4.6% after-hours on a strong earnings beat and bullish multi-year outlook.
